prompt: Talk about your daily routine and free time.
transcript: Well, I usually get up at six thirty and go to school by bus. My daily routine is quite busy, but I try to have some free time in the evening. For example, I often listen to music or talk with my close friend after dinner. In my opinion, it is important to relax because students have a lot of homework. To sum up, my routine is simple, but it helps me stay organised.
